plan_phases.description: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,925/month to retirement savings + $850/month to investments

recommendations.action: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,925/month to retirement savings + $850/month to investments
recommendations.reason: Your personalised plan: Months 1–6: Redirect $1,925/month to retirement savings + $850/month to investments

recommendations.action: Add disability insurance to your benefits
recommendations.reason: Disability is a top cause of unplanned income loss; check whether your employer offers it.

recommendations.action: Check in weekly on your spending
recommendations.reason: A weekly look at where your money went is the strongest predictor of momentum — a few minutes is enough.

recommendations.action: Increase retirement contributions by 1% of gross income
recommendations.reason: Small annual escalations are the most reliable way to hit age-based wealth targets.
